@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(expiry, skew30_boundary_refresh_loop)
C: expMs<nowMs∧nowMs-expMs<=30000
H: accept ∧ skew30 ∧ grace ∧ only ∧ at ∧ boundary
P: expMs<nowMs→401 ∧ expMs<nowMs∧nowMs-expMs<=30000→allow
V: edge(-30s_200)∧edge(-31s_401)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(expiry, skew30_boundary_refresh_loop).
Constraints: expMs<nowMs and nowMs-expMs<=30000.
Hypothesis: accept and 30-second grace window and grace and only and at and boundary.
Plan: expMs<nowMs then 401 and expMs<nowMs and nowMs-expMs<=30000 then allow.
Verify: edge(-30s_200) and edge(-31s_401).
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(refresh_rotation_replay_guard)
C: refresh_token(old) ∧ parallel_retry ∧ 409_loop
H: race ∧ on ∧ rotation ∧ check ∧ before ∧ token ∧ state ∧ is ∧ finalized
P: old_refresh_token ∧ reuse → single ∧ 409 ∧ then ∧ idempotent ∧ reject
V: old_refresh_token ∧ first_reuse→409 ∧ subsequent_reuse→no_new_loop
R: !looping-409-on-parallel-refresh
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(refresh_rotation_replay_guard).
Constraints: refresh_token(old) and parallel_retry and 409_loop.
Hypothesis: race and on and rotation and check and before and token and state and is and finalized.
Plan: old_refresh_token and reuse then single and 409 and then and idempotent and reject.
Verify: old_refresh_token and first_reuse then 409 and subsequent_reuse then no_new_loop.
Risk: high-risk looping-409-on-parallel-refresh.
Answer target: regression test.

G: fix(webhook_verify_timestamp_skew)
C: abs(now-ts)>300→401 ∧ provider_skew_valid→accept
H: edge(-30s_200) ∧ edge(-31s_401) ∧ keep_401
P: if abs(now-ts)>300 then allow only provider_skew_expected; otherwise verify signature and accept
V: reg_test(300) ∧ reg_test(401

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(oauth_callback_expiry_ms/sec_normalization)
C: exp<now=>401 ∧ ms_sec_mismatch
H: normalize_exp_to_sec_once
P: exp_ms→exp_sec→compare_now_sec
V: fresh_token_ms∧accepted_after_norm
R: !reject_fresh_token_due_to_unit_skew
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(oauth_callback_expiry_ms/sec_normalization).
Constraints: exp<now implies 401 and ms_sec_mismatch.
Hypothesis: normalize_exp_to_sec_once.
Plan: exp_ms then exp_sec then compare_now_sec.
Verify: fresh_token_ms and accepted_after_norm.
Risk: high-risk reject_fresh_token_due_to_unit_skew.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(ttl_boundary_serve_fresh)

C: age>=ttl ∧ etag_cache_freshness ∧ boundary_304_loop

H: exact_boundary_stale_loop ∧ caused ∧ by ∧ ttl ∧ comparison ∧ using ∧ age>=ttl ∧ for ∧ revalidation

P: age==ttl → serve_fresh ∧ age>ttl → revalidate

V: ttl_boundary_fresh ∧ no_infinite_revalidate

R: !boundary_st
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(ttl_boundary_serve_fresh).
Constraints: age>=ttl and etag_cache_freshness and boundary_304_loop.
Hypothesis: exact_boundary_stale_loop and caused and by and ttl and comparison and using and age>=ttl and for and revalidation.
Plan: age==ttl then serve_fresh and age>ttl then revalidate.
Verify: ttl_boundary_fresh and no_infinite_revalidate.
Risk: high-risk boundary_st.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(reset-edge_release_exactly_once)
C: now>reset ∧ retry-after ∧ 429
H: boundary ∧ race ∧ on ∧ limiter ∧ reset
P: now>=reset → allow_once ∧ now<reset → deny ∧ retry_after
V: reset_at ∧ no_retry_storm
R: !early_release ∧ !double_release
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(reset-edge_release_exactly_once).
Constraints: now>reset and retry-after and 429.
Hypothesis: boundary and race and on and limiter and reset.
Plan: now>=reset then allow_once and now<reset then deny and retry_after.
Verify: reset_at and no_retry_storm.
Risk: high-risk early_release and high-risk double_release.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(public_ping_401)
C: auth_guard(public_ping)∧!session
H: preserve(healthcheck_bypass)∧allow(public_ping)
P: public_ping∧!session→200
V: public_ping∧session→200 ∧ healthcheck∧!session→200
R: !session⇒401 ∧ for ∧ protected_only
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(public_ping_401).
Constraints: auth_guard(public_ping) and high-risk session.
Hypothesis: preserve(healthcheck_bypass) and allow(public_ping).
Plan: public_ping and high-risk session then 200.
Verify: public_ping and session then 200 and healthcheck and high-risk session then 200.
Risk: high-risk session implies 401 and for and protected_only.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(overdue→402, grace24h_exact, boundary_charge_loop)
C: billing_overdue_middleware ∧ overdue_flag ∧ grace24h_timer
H: now-ts<24h→200 ∧ now-ts>=24h→402
P: boundary(-30s_200) ∧ edge(-31s_401) → no_charge_loop
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(overdue then 402, grace24h_exact, boundary_charge_loop).
Constraints: billing_overdue_middleware and overdue_flag and grace24h_timer.
Hypothesis: now-ts<24h then 200 and now-ts>=24h then 402.
Plan: boundary(-30s_200) and edge(-31s_401) then no_charge_loop.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.
